content_body: This house takes every advantage of the mountain views. I really enjoyed the open layout, enormous windows, and uncluttered feel. No annoyances such as broken accouterments or lack of supplies (cooking, toilet paper, etc.). The technology (thermostats, cable tv, wifi, even Playstation) all worked without the inevitable, aggravating hiccups one has come to expect from mountain rentals. Everything worked as intended and communication with the managing office is kept to a streamlined email minimum. The drive to Blue Ridge is short and uncomplicated while a nearby grocery store makes food-shopping easy. I highly recommend it.
title: Highly Recommend
